title: yakuza fishing
description: adds funny yakuza stuff for fishing. lol
body:
you ever felt bored when fishing? just waiting for the fish to hook, then catch it...... hnnn shoeee...

now THIS mod adds yakuza-like effects when fishing, by adding sound effects, music (when hooked), and gui text. Awesome!

-- LEGAL --

The sound effects and music (Fish On!! - Yakuza 3) are owned by RGG Studio, and i do not claim any right over them.
